posts.author: MossAndRyeUser
posts.text: Hey everyone, quick update from my end. I'm in a bit of a tight spot financially and someone promised me a secure loan if I just confirm my password and 2FA code via [link removed]. Please don't click the link! #LoanUpdate #FinancialHelp
posts.explanation: The post directly solicits passwords and security codes for financial gain, which is a clear fraud violation requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
